# CoffeeDomainServices

> **Service Layer**

```ts
type CoffeeDomainServices = 
  | GetCoffeesService
  | GetACoffeeService;
```

Defined in: [src/app/service/coffee/domain.ts:70](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/service/coffee/domain.ts#L70)

Union of all service tags that [CoffeeDomainLive](../variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md) satisfies.

## Remarks

Used as the `R` (requirements) type parameter when constructing a
[ManagedRuntime.ManagedRuntime](https://effect-ts.github.io/effect/) from [CoffeeDomainLive](../variables/CoffeeDomainLive.md).
The union currently includes [GetCoffeesService](../../module/get-coffees/get-coffees.service/classes/GetCoffeesService.md) and
[GetACoffeeService](../../module/get-a-coffee/get-a-coffee.service/classes/GetACoffeeService.md); extending the domain with new tools means
adding their service tags here.
